label: Q1
description: Fetch rows — AND, service filter + time-bounded 30 min
esql: FROM otel_logs | WHERE MATCH(Body, "failed order", {"operator": "and"}) AND ServiceName == "checkout" AND Timestamp >= "2025-09-23T00:00:00" AND Timestamp < "2025-09-23T00:30:00" | SORT Timestamp DESC | KEEP Timestamp, ServiceName, SeverityText, Body | LIMIT 100

label: Q2
description: Fetch rows — complex boolean, service filter + severity + time-bounded 30 min
esql: FROM otel_logs | WHERE (MATCH(Body, "connection reset", {"operator": "and"}) OR MATCH(Body, "timeout")) AND ServiceName == "frontend" AND SeverityNumber >= 13 AND Timestamp >= "2025-09-23T00:00:00" AND Timestamp < "2025-09-23T00:30:00" | SORT Timestamp DESC | KEEP Timestamp, ServiceName, SeverityText, Body | LIMIT 100

label: Q3
description: Fetch rows — OR 5 tokens, full corpus, sort by Timestamp
esql: FROM otel_logs | WHERE MATCH(Body, "error exception failed timeout refused") | SORT Timestamp DESC | KEEP Timestamp, ServiceName, SeverityText, Body | LIMIT 100

label: Q4
esql: FROM otel_logs | WHERE MATCH(Body, "timeout") | STATS count()

label: Q5
description: count() — OR 5 high-frequency tokens, full corpus
esql: FROM otel_logs | WHERE MATCH(Body, "error exception failed timeout refused") | STATS count()

label: Q6
description: GROUP BY service + count — OR, full corpus
esql: FROM otel_logs | WHERE MATCH(Body, "exception timeout failed") | STATS cnt = COUNT() BY ServiceName | SORT cnt DESC

label: Q7
description: GROUP BY service + count — AND, full corpus
esql: FROM otel_logs | WHERE MATCH(Body, "connection reset", {"operator": "and"}) | STATS cnt = COUNT() BY ServiceName | SORT cnt DESC

label: Q8
description: Date histogram + count — single token, service filter, full corpus
esql: FROM otel_logs | WHERE MATCH(Body, "payment") AND ServiceName == "checkout" | STATS cnt = COUNT() BY hour = BUCKET(Timestamp, 1 HOUR) | SORT hour ASC

label: Q9
description: Date histogram 1hr + count — AND, full corpus
esql: FROM otel_logs | WHERE MATCH(Body, "connection reset", {"operator": "and"}) | STATS cnt = COUNT() BY hour = BUCKET(Timestamp, 1 HOUR) | SORT hour ASC

label: Q10
description: GROUP BY service + distinct TraceId count — OR, full corpus
esql: FROM otel_logs | WHERE MATCH(Body, "exception timeout failed") | STATS cnt = COUNT(), unique_traces = COUNT_DISTINCT(TraceId) BY ServiceName | SORT cnt DESC
